zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Geoffrey Middleton於1480年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓時，他的父親Thomas Middleton16歲，母親Margaret Lascalles50歲。他於1499年與Lady Margaret Kirkham在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德肯達爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1545年登記服兵役。他去世於1545年8月28日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德享年65歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德隆斯達爾 沃德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Geoffrey Middleton于1480年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓时，他的父亲Thomas Middleton16岁，母亲Margaret Lascalles50岁。他于1499年与Lady Margaret Kirkham在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德肯達爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1545年登记服兵役。他去世于1545年8月28日在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德享年65岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德隆斯達爾 沃德。

nameMeanings.name: Middleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Geoffrey Middleton was born in 1480, in Middleton, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Middleton, was 16 and his mother, Margaret Lascalles, was 50. He married Lady Margaret Kirkham in 1499, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1545. He died on 28 August 1545, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Lonsdale Ward, Westmorland, England.

historicEvents.description: 1492 : débarquement dans l'île par les Européens ayant à leur tête Christophe Colomb.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Geoffrey Middleton est né en 1480, à Middleton, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Middleton, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lascalles, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Kirkham en 1499, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1545. Il est décédé le 28 août 1545, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Lonsdale Ward, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Geoffrey Middleton 1480 in Middleton, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Middleton 16 und seine Mutter Margaret Lascalles 50. Er hat 1499 in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Kirkham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1545 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 28. August 1545 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lonsdale Ward, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Middleton è nato il nel 1480 nel Middleton, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Middleton, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lascalles, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Kirkham nel 1499, nel Kendal, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1545. Morì il 28 agosto 1545, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Lonsdale Ward, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Middletonが1480年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Middletonは16歳，母Margaret Lascallesは50歳であった。1499年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルでLady Margaret Kirkhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年に兵役登録をした。彼は1545年8月28日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで65歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドロンスダル ワードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Middleton(이)가 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Middleton(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lascalles(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 Lady Margaret Kirkham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1545년 8월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 론즈데일 워드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Middleton nasceu em 1480, em Middleton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Middleton, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lascalles, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Kirkham em 1499, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1545. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1545, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Lonsdale Ward, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Geoffrey Middleton родился в 1480 г. в местности миддлетон, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Middleton было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lascalles, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Kirkham в 1499 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1545 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 28 августа 1545 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности лонсдеил вард, вестморланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Geoffrey Middleton nació en 1480, en Middleton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Middleton, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Margaret Lascalles, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Kirkham en 1499, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1545. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1545, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Lonsdale Ward, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
